name: Chainlaced Crushers

passives.name: Noxian Persistence
passives.effects: Taking {{as|magic damage}} from champions grants you a {{tip|shield}} that absorbs {{pp|100 to 200|color=md}} {{as|(+ 8% '''bonus''' health)}} {{as|magic damage}} for 5 seconds.

effects_structured.raw: Taking {{as magic damage}} from champions grants you a {{tip shield}} that absorbs {{pp 100 to 200 color=md}} {{as (+ 8% '''bonus''' health)}} {{as magic damage}} for 5 seconds.

simpleDescription: Increases Move Speed and Cooldown Reduction

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model review: Noxian Persistence triggers only after taking champion magic damage, then grants a temporary self-only magic shield.
Formula validation: shield value scales 100-200 by level with +8% bonus-health contribution, lasts 5 seconds, and is gated by a 15-second cooldown.
